query: add `lodash` pinned to `^4.17.21` to dependencies. Also add `redis` pinned to `^4.6.13` to dependencies. Preserve every existing dependency exactly.
add a `test` script that runs exactly the command `vitest run`, and add `vitest` at `^1.5.0` to devDependencies. Keep the other scripts (dev/build/preview) and other devDependencies unchanged.
check: jq -e '.scripts.test == "vitest run" and .devDependencies.vitest == "^1.5.0" and .scripts.dev == "vite" and .scripts.build == "vite build" and .devDependencies.vite == "^5.2.0"' $FILE
